title: plumeria trinitensis
intro: Plumeria trinitensis, also known as the Jamaican frangipani or yellow plumeria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Plumeria trinitensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Plumeria trinitensis can be infused in hot water to make a tea, or they can be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
